note: Two-tier ProjectWriteLocks (Mutex<HashMap<PathBuf, Arc<Mutex<()>>>>) with outer map lock released before inner. 21 write_project callsites + all git mutators + backup_on_close all wrapped. Reads inside the closure (not before) so read-modify-write is fully serialized. No re-entrancy via command-to-command calls. 2 new tests use real threads with timing assertions to prove same-project serialization and cross-project independence. Minor: project_lock_key doesn't canonicalize non-existent paths (concurrent create_project on same target via different path shapes — pathological).
